title: Laser Scan Pattern (LSP) Document
description: Canonical exchange format for arbitrary laser scan patterns with embedded MPE-relevant metadata. Version 1.0.0 of the schema. Compatibility policy: minor versions (1.x) add optional fields only; patch versions (1.0.x) fix wording or examples without changing semantics; major versions (2.x) may rename or remove. Unknown top-level keys in input documents are preserved by readers but may be warned about.

lsp_version.description: SemVer string identifying the schema version this document conforms to. Readers should accept any 1.x.x document and may warn on unknown patches.

lsp_schema.description: Optional URL of the JSON Schema document this LSP document was authored against. Informational only; validators use lsp_version to resolve the schema.

meta.description: Document-level metadata: identity, units, coordinate frame, bounding box.

description.description: Free-form description of the pattern's intent and provenance.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the document was created.

source_tool.description: Name and version of the tool that emitted this document.

coordinate_frame.description: Interpretation of the (x, y) coordinates. sample_plane is the default and means physical coordinates at the imaging plane. scanner_angle means mechanical scanner angles in radians. galvo_voltage means raw drive voltages.

units.description: Declared physical units for the document. Required because the most common source of MPE error is a silent unit confusion.

length.description: Unit for spatial coordinates and beam diameter.

time.description: Unit for durations and time-sampled axes.

wavelength.description: Unit for laser wavelength. Defaults to nm.

origin.description: Optional document origin in declared length units. Defaults to [0, 0].

extent_bbox.description: Optional bounding box [[x_min, y_min], [x_max, y_max]] in declared length units. Used by validators to flag out-of-range coordinates.

laser.description: Laser source parameters required for MPE evaluation.

wavelength_nm.description: Center wavelength in nanometers. ICNIRP 2013 valid range is 180 to 1,000,000 nm.

beam_diameter_mm.description: Beam diameter at the exposure plane in millimeters, using the definition specified in beam_diameter_definition.

beam_diameter_definition.description: Definition under which the beam diameter is reported. The engine assumes 1/e^2 intensity by default.

pulse_mode.description: cw indicates a continuous-wave laser. pulsed requires the pulse object to be populated.

pulse.description: Pulsed-laser parameters. Required when pulse_mode is pulsed; ignored when pulse_mode is cw.

repetition_rate_hz.description: Pulse repetition frequency in Hz. Must be positive.

pulse_duration_s.description: Single-pulse duration in seconds. Must be positive.

pulse_energy_j.description: Optional explicit per-pulse energy in joules. If absent, computed from segment power and repetition rate.

exposure.description: Exposure-window parameters required for MPE evaluation under ICNIRP 2013 Rule 2.

tissue.description: Target tissue. Only skin is currently supported by the MPE engine.

exposure_duration_s.description: Total exposure window in seconds. Used as the time argument to MPE(t) in Rule 2.

aperture_mm.description: Optional ICNIRP averaging aperture in millimeters. If absent, the engine's default for the chosen tissue is used.

pattern.description: The scan pattern itself. Either segments, samples, or parameterized must be populated, as indicated by representation.

representation.description: Which structural form this pattern is encoded in. segments is a piecewise-constant event list. samples is a dense time-sampled waveform. hybrid means both are present and the authoritative field disambiguates.

authoritative.description: Which encoding is canonical on round-trip when more than one is present.

default_velocity_mm_s.description: Optional default velocity in mm/s applied to any segment that omits an explicit velocity. Ignored when representation is samples.

default_power_w.description: Optional default power in watts applied to any segment that omits an explicit power. Ignored when representation is samples.

loop.description: Optional looping policy. enabled false means the pattern is single-shot; otherwise count specifies the number of repetitions and frame_gap_s the blanked dwell between them.

segments.description: Ordered list of scan segments. Required when representation is segments or hybrid.

samples.description: Time-sampled waveform. Required when representation is samples or hybrid.

parameterized.description: Editor-only parameterized shape definitions. Preserved on round-trip but never the source of truth for computation; the segments or samples blocks must be regenerated whenever parameterized is edited.

sidecar.description: Optional reference to an external file holding the dense arrays. Reserved for Phase 2 HDF5 sidecar support.

validation_hints.description: Optional bounds the authoring tool believes its pattern stays within. The validator uses these to reject malformed or adversarial inputs early.

Velocity.description: Velocity specification for a single segment. Three modes are supported.

oneOf.description: Constant velocity over the entire segment.
Linear velocity ramp between v_start and v_end over the segment's parametric length.

Power.description: Optical power specification for a single segment.

oneOf.description: Constant power over the entire segment.
Linear power ramp between start and end values over the segment's parametric length.

Segment.description: One element of a scan pattern's segment list. type discriminates the geometry.

p0.description: Start point [x, y] in declared length units.

p1.description: End point [x, y] in declared length units. Required for line and move; required for arc as the endpoint; absent for dwell.

center.description: Arc center point [x, y] in declared length units. Required for arc.

sweep_rad.description: Signed arc sweep in radians (positive counter-clockwise). Required for arc.

duration_s.description: Dwell duration in seconds. Required for dwell.

blanked.description: If true, the laser is off during this segment regardless of power. Defaults to false.

sample_rate_hz.description: Uniform sampling rate of all arrays in this block, in hertz.

encoding.description: Reserved for future binary encodings. Phase 1 supports only inline JSON arrays.

x.description: X coordinates at each sample, in declared length units.

y.description: Y coordinates at each sample, in declared length units.

power.description: Optional power at each sample, in declared power units. If absent, pattern.default_power_w is used.

blanked.description: Optional per-sample blanking flag. If absent, no samples are blanked.

ParameterizedShape.description: Editor-only parameterized shape definition. Preserved across round-trips.
